overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a dark foggy forest at night with a torch, crossing a wooden bridge to a rustic log cabin, investigating the bloodstained exterior, exploring the candlelit interior, and returning to the forest. The atmosphere is ominous with dense vegetation and dynamic torch lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark foggy forest holding a torch to illuminate the narrow dirt path

entered.detail: tall pine trees lining both sides of the forest path, barely visible in the fog
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest floor
dense bushes and ferns growing alongside the path
dead wood and branches scattered on the forest floor
large rocks covered in moss beside the trail
prominent rock formation near the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path through a dense foggy forest at night, illuminated only by the torch. Tall pine trees line both sides with thick undergrowth, fallen branches, and mossy rocks visible in the shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge approach to rustic cabin

events.description: steps onto wooden bridge crossing a small ravine or stream
discovers bloodstains and a dead body near the cabin entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge and cautiously approaching the cabin upon noticing the blood and corpse

notable_agents.action: dead body lying face down in a pool of blood on the cabin porch

entered.detail: rudimentary wooden footbridge made of planks crossing a depression
rustic wooden cabin with log walls and a thatched roof
roof made of straw or reeds extending over the cabin walls
simple wooden picket fence surrounding the cabin area
dark red blood pooled on the wooden porch surface
human body lying motionless in blood near the door
vertical wooden posts supporting the porch structure
wooden crates and barrels stacked near the cabin wall
elevated wooden deck platform serving as the cabin entrance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden footbridge and approaches a rustic log cabin with a thatched roof. Blood stains and a dead body are visible on the wooden porch, creating a grim atmosphere as the character moves toward the entrance, passing wooden posts and supply crates.

events.description: enters the log cabin through the wooden door into the main room
turns to examine the side room with shelves and storage chests

agents.ego_description: moving through the cabin rooms examining the rustic interior, looking at shelves and glancing out the window

entered.detail: threshold marking the transition from exterior to interior
rough-hewn wooden log walls of the cabin interior
exposed wooden beams supporting the thatched roof from inside
planked wooden flooring throughout the cabin
warm flickering light from candles illuminating the space
thick wooden posts supporting the ceiling structure
wall-mounted shelves holding pottery and supplies
large wooden chest for storage against the wall
fireplace made of stones with a cooking pot
lit candles providing the primary light source
simple wooden bed frame with straw mattress
small window showing the dark forest outside
storage containers with lids open revealing contents
crates and boxes stacked in the corner

segments.scene_description: Inside the cabin, warm candlelight illuminates wooden walls, support beams, and rustic furniture including shelves, a stone hearth, and a bed. The character explores the interior rooms, examining storage chests and looking through a window at the dark forest before moving toward the back room.

events.description: exits the cabin back to the exterior porch area
turns left to circle around the cabin passing a wood pile and drying rack

agents.ego_description: exiting the cabin and walking around the exterior to investigate the surroundings before heading back into the forest

entered.detail: exterior view of the log walls and thatched roof from the side
stack of chopped firewood against the cabin wall
wooden frame with an animal pelt stretched out to dry
trail leading away from the cabin back into the woods
simple gate structure marking the boundary of the cabin area

segments.scene_description: The character exits the cabin and walks around the exterior, passing a pile of chopped wood and an animal pelt drying rack. After circling the structure, the character returns to the forest path, passes through a wooden gate, and heads back into the dense foggy woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, oppressive forest into the flickering warmth of a rustic cabin before returning to the nocturnal wilderness. It begins by tracking along a narrow dirt path through dense fog and towering pines, where the only light comes from a handheld torch casting long shadows over mossy rocks. As the path leads across a wooden footbridge, the scene shifts to a grim exterior where bloodstains and a corpse mark the porch of a thatched-roof log cabin. The camera then moves inside, transitioning from the cold night to a candlelit interior filled with wooden beams, a stone hearth, and rustic furniture. Finally, the view exits the cabin to pass a woodpile and drying pelt before gliding through a wooden gate and disappearing back into the thick, foggy woods.
